text.content: Celebrating the spirit of fishing and deepening connections with the angling community

rich_text.plain_text: Celebrating the spirit of fishing and deepening connections with the angling community

text.content:
[Danvers, Massachusetts, January 31, 2025] — MAXAM Tire, a global leader in specialty tire manufacturing, is thrilled to announce its return as the title sponsor for the 2025 Bassmaster Elite Series, further solidifying its partnership with B.A.S.S. and commitment to the fishing community.

The 2025 MAXAM Tire Bassmaster Elite at Sabine River in Orange, Texas, is set to take place from May 15–18, bringing world-class anglers and fishing enthusiasts together for four days of competition, camaraderie, and celebration of the sport. In addition, MAXAM Tire is proud to serve as a local sponsor for the prestigious Bassmaster Classic, hosted in Fort Worth, Texas, from March 21–23, 2025.

“Fishing is more than a sport—it’s a passion that connects generations and communities,” said Steve Cunningham, Director of Marketing for MAXAM Tire. “At MAXAM, we’re proud to support an event that resonates deeply with our customers and aligns with our brand’s commitment to precision, performance, and reliability. Partnering with Bassmaster allows us to continue celebrating the values of dedication and excellence that anglers bring to the water—and that we bring to every tire we design.”

Fans can enjoy live coverage of the MAXAM Tire Bassmaster Elite at Orange on Bassmaster.com and FOX Sports digital platforms starting Thursday, May 15. FS1 will also provide live broadcasts of the tournament leaders during the weekend’s competition.

MAXAM Tire’s sponsorship demonstrates the company’s passion for the sport and its dedication to empowering anglers and outdoor enthusiasts alike. From off-road terrain to the open road, MAXAM’s specialty tires are engineered to deliver peak performance in the most demanding conditions, just as anglers rely on top-tier gear to excel in challenging waters.

For media inquiries, please contact: marketing@maxamtirena.com
